```
name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        python-version: ["3.10", "3.11", "3.12", "3.13"]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install uv
        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v6
        with:
          enable-cache: true

      - name: Set up Python ${{ matrix.python-version }}
        run: uv python install ${{ matrix.python-version }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: uv sync --extra dev

      - name: Lint
        run: uv run task lint

      - name: Run tests
        run: uv run task test

      - name: Build package
        run: uv build --no-sources

      - name: Check distribution metadata
        run: uv run twine check --strict dist/*

      - name: Verify wheel install and import
        run: |
          uv run --with dist/*.whl --no-project -- python -c "
          from mlflow_widgets import MlflowChart, MlflowRunTable, MlflowRunSelector, MlflowParallelCoordinates
          import mlflow_widgets
          print(f'mlflow-widgets {mlflow_widgets.__version__} imported successfully')
          "
```

```
name: Docs

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: pages
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
        with:
          enable-cache: true

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.13"

      - run: uv sync --extra docs

      - run: uv run mkdocs build --strict

      - uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: site

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v5
```

```
Output:
name: Publish to PyPI

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*"
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      target:
        description: "Publish target"
        required: true
        default: "testpypi"
        type: choice
        options:
          - testpypi
          - pypi

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install uv
        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v6
        with:
          enable-cache: true

      - name: Build package
        run: uv build --no-sources

      - name: Check distribution metadata
        run: uvx twine check --strict dist/*

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dist
          path: dist/

  publish-testpypi:
    needs: build
    if: github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.target == 'testpypi'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: testpypi
    permissions:
      id-token: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install uv
        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v6

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dist
          path: dist/

      - name: Publish to TestPyPI
        run: uv publish --publish-url https://test.pypi.org/legacy/

  publish-pypi:
    needs: build
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/v')
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: pypi
    permissions:
      id-token: write
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install uv
        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v6

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dist
          path: dist/

      - name: Publish to PyPI
        run: uv publish
```

_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-04-01 14:26:05Z)**_

截至 **2026-04-01**，答案是：

**如果這個 repo 是公開的**，基本上 **會被免費額度 cover**。GitHub 官方目前寫的是：**public repository 使用 standard GitHub-hosted runners 是免費的**，而且 **GitHub Pages 也屬於免費使用**。你這個專案的 workflow 都是 `ubuntu-latest`，不是 larger runners，所以符合這個範圍。  
來源：[GitHub Actions billing](https://docs.github.com/en/billing/concepts/product-billing/github-actions), [GitHub Pricing](https://github.com/pricing)

**如果這個 repo 是私有的**，GitHub Free 目前是 **2,000 分鐘/月 + 500 MB artifact storage + 10 GB cache storage**。以你現在這個配置來看，多半也夠一般 side project / 小型開源節奏用，但不是無上限。  
來源：[GitHub Actions billing](https://docs.github.com/en/billing/concepts/product-billing/github-actions)

按你 repo 目前的 workflow 粗估：
- `ci.yml` 是 **4 個 Python 版本 matrix**
- `docs.yml` 只在 push `main` 時跑
- `publish.yml` 只在 tag 或手動時跑

粗抓每個 matrix job 如果是 **3 到 6 分鐘**，那一次 CI workflow 大概會吃 **12 到 24 分鐘**。  
所以私有 repo 的 **2,000 分鐘/月**，大概能撐 **80 到 160 次這種 CI run**。對個人專案通常夠；如果你每個 PR 都反覆 push 很多次、每月幾十個 PR，才比較可能逼近上限。

結論很簡單：
- **公開 repo**：是，正常用量幾乎肯定 cover。
- **私有 repo**：大概率也夠，但要看你每月 PR / push 頻率；這個 matrix CI 是主要消耗點。
- 你這份配置裡，**分鐘數比 storage 更可能先成為限制**。

如果你要，我可以直接幫你再算一版更具體的：
「每月 N 個 PR、每個 PR 平均推送 M 次」會吃掉多少 GitHub Actions 分鐘。
